name: Kristin Amundsen
subject: Private event booking
message: Hi! We're looking to book the café for a birthday gathering of about 20 people on a Saturday evening in September. Is that something you can host, and what would it cost?

name: Oskar Trane
subject: Allergy question
message: Do any of your smoothies contain nuts? My daughter has a cashew allergy and I want to make sure before we order.

name: Frida Nystrøm
subject: Loved the jazz evening!
message: Just wanted to say the live jazz night last week was fantastic — please keep doing these! Will you be announcing the next one soon?

name: Magnus Ellingsen
subject: Wholesale coffee beans
message: I run a small office nearby and I'm curious whether you sell your coffee beans wholesale or in bulk bags. Let me know who I should talk to.

name: Ingeborg Sæther
subject: Gluten-free options
message: Are any of your wraps or baguettes available with a gluten-free base? Happy to pay extra if it's an option.

name: Theodor Isaksen
subject: Job application
message: Hello, I saw you might be hiring baristas for the summer. I have two years of café experience and would love to send over my CV — who should I address it to?
